themeWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

sentenceTheme: A comprehensive pronouncement of judgment against Moab for pride and idolatry, ending with a promise of latter restoration.

verses.text: Against Moab thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Woe unto Nebo! for it is spoiled: Kiriathaim is confounded and taken: Misgab is confounded and dismayed.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: There shall be no more praise of Moab: in Heshbon they have devised evil against it; Come, and let us cut it off from being a nation. Thou also shalt be cut down, O Madmen; the sword shall pursue thee.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: A voice of crying shall be from Horonaim, spoiling and great destruction.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Moab is destroyed; her little ones have caused a cry to be heard.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For in the going up of Luhith continual weeping shall go up; for in the going down of Horonaim the enemies have heard a cry of destruction.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Flee, save your lives, and be like the heath in the wilderness.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For because thou hast trusted in thy works and in thy treasures, thou shalt also be taken: and Chemosh shall go forth into captivity with his priests and his princes together.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And the spoiler shall come upon every city, and no city shall escape: the valley also shall perish, and the plain shall be destroyed, as the LORD hath spoken.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Give wings unto Moab, that it may flee and get away: for the cities thereof shall be desolate, without any to dwell therein.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Cursed be he that doeth the work of the LORD deceitfully, and cursed be he that keepeth back his sword from blood.

highlightedWords.meaning: The proper name of the God of Israel
Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people

verses.text: Moab hath been at ease from his youth, and he hath settled on his lees, and hath not been emptied from vessel to vessel, neither hath he gone into captivity: therefore his taste remained in him, and his scent is not changed.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that I will send unto him wanderers, that shall cause him to wander, and shall empty his vessels, and break their bottles.

highlightedWords.meaning: The proper name of the God of Israel
Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people

verses.text: And Moab shall be ashamed of Chemosh, as the house of Israel was ashamed of Bethel their confidence.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: How say ye, We are mighty and strong men for the war?

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Moab is spoiled, and gone up out of her cities, and his chosen young men are gone down to the slaughter, saith the King, whose name is the LORD of hosts.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: The calamity of Moab is near to come, and his affliction hasteth fast.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: All ye that are about him, bemoan him; and all ye that know his name, say, How is the strong staff broken, and the beautiful rod!

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Thou daughter that dost inhabit Dibon, come down from thy glory, and sit in thirst; for the spoiler of Moab shall come upon thee, and he shall destroy thy strong holds.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: O inhabitant of Aroer, stand by the way, and espy; ask him that fleeth, and her that escapeth, and say, What is done?

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Moab is confounded; for it is broken down: howl and cry; tell ye it in Arnon, that Moab is spoiled.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And judgment is come upon the plain country; upon Holon, and upon Jahazah, and upon Mephaath,

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And upon Dibon, and upon Nebo, and upon Beth-diblathaim,

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And upon Kiriathaim, and upon Beth-gamul, and upon Beth-meon,

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And upon Kerioth, and upon Bozrah, and upon all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: The horn of Moab is cut off, and his arm is broken, saith the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Make ye him drunken: for he magnified himself against the LORD: Moab also shall wallow in his vomit, and he also shall be in derision.

highlightedWords.meaning: The proper name of the God of Israel
Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people

verses.text: For was not Israel a derision unto thee? was he found among thieves? for since thou spakest of him, thou skippedst for joy.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: O ye that dwell in Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock, and be like the dove that maketh her nest in the sides of the hole's mouth.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: We have heard the pride of Moab, (he is exceeding proud) his loftiness, and his arrogancy, and his pride, and the haughtiness of his heart.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: I know his wrath, saith the LORD; but it shall not be so; his lies shall not so effect it.

highlightedWords.meaning: The proper name of the God of Israel
Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people

verses.text: Therefore will I howl for Moab, and I will cry out for all Moab; mine heart shall mourn for the men of Kir-heres.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: O vine of Sibmah, I will weep for thee with the weeping of Jazer: thy plants are gone over the sea, they reach even to the sea of Jazer: the spoiler is fallen upon thy summer fruits and upon thy vintage.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And joy and gladness is taken from the plentiful field, and from the land of Moab; and I have caused wine to fail from the winepresses: none shall tread with shouting; their shouting shall be no shouting.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: From the cry of Heshbon even unto Elealeh, and even unto Jahaz, have they uttered their voice, from Zoar even unto Horonaim, as an heifer of three years old: for the waters also of Nimrim shall be desolate.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab, saith the LORD, him that offereth in the high places, and him that burneth incense to his gods.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Therefore mine heart shall sound for Moab like pipes, and mine heart shall sound like pipes for the men of Kir-heres: because the riches that he hath gotten are perished.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For every head shall be bald, and every beard clipped: upon all the hands shall be cuttings, and upon the loins sackcloth.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: There shall be lamentation generally upon all the housetops of Moab, and in the streets thereof: for I have broken Moab like a vessel wherein is no pleasure, saith the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: They shall howl, saying, How is it broken down! how hath Moab turned the back with shame! so shall Moab be a derision and a dismaying to all them about him.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For thus saith the LORD; Behold, he shall fly as an eagle, and shall spread his wings over Moab.

highlightedWords.meaning: The proper name of the God of Israel
Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people

verses.text: Kerioth is taken, and the strong holds are surprised, and the mighty men's hearts in Moab at that day shall be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And Moab shall be destroyed from being a people, because he hath magnified himself against the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Fear, and the pit, and the snare, shall be upon thee, O inhabitant of Moab, saith the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: He that fleeth from the fear shall fall into the pit; and he that getteth up out of the pit shall be taken in the snare: for I will bring upon it, even upon Moab, the year of their visitation, saith the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: They that fled stood under the shadow of Heshbon because of the force: but a fire shall come forth out of Heshbon, and a flame from the midst of Sihon, and shall devour the corner of Moab, and the crown of the head of the tumultuous ones.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Woe be unto thee, O Moab! the people of Chemosh perisheth: for thy sons are taken captives, and thy daughters captives.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Yet will I bring again the captivity of Moab in the latter days, saith the LORD. Thus far is the judgment of Moab.

highlightedWords.meaning: Moab; a son of Lot; also his territory and people
The proper name of the God of Israel
